title: Keynote: The Future of AI in Tech
speaker: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
description: Join our opening keynote as Dr. Jenkins explores the ethical implications and future capabilities of artificial intelligence in modern software development.

title: Workshop: Hands-on React Native
speaker: Prof. Mark Thompson
description: A deep dive into building cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Bring your laptops! Pre-requisite: Basic JavaScript knowledge.

title: Panel: Launching Your Startup
speaker: Alumni Founders Group
description: Hear from recent Penn State alumni who successfully transitioned their senior projects into fully-funded startup companies.
